title: Shulker Boxes Names
description: This data pack shows the custom name of the shulker boxes you place. A great utility to facilitate your building organization or your farming sessions.
body:
![Shulker Boxes Names](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe05781cf62de1142a516555db7dad0ce0f06743.jpeg)

# **Shulker Boxes Names**

**Visible names for shulker boxes**

This data pack shows the custom name of the shulker boxes you place above them.

# 🪄Introduction
## What is Shulker Boxes Names?

As other items, **shulker boxes** can be renamed within an **anvil**.  
This data pack shows the custom name of the shulker boxes you place above them.  
A great utility to facilitate your building organization or your farming sessions.

# 🧹 Uninstall

Shulker Boxes Names comes with an automatic uninstallation process. Running it will:
- Remove nameplates of shulker boxes
- Remove all scores and storage specific to the Shulker Boxes Names data pack
- If there is no more KawaMood data packs installed, also remove all common scores and storages

The command to start the uninstalling process is the following one: 
```
/function pk_sh_bo:cmd/uninstall
```

# 🪠 Report an issue

If you encountered an issue with this data pack, preferably join the [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/w8s9XWgN6v), and open a post in the dedicated **#data-pack-issues** channel to describe your problem. Please, don't forget to provide all necessary informations including:
- The Minecraft version you're using.
- The version of the concerned data pack you're using.
- If you're using any modified version like Forge, Paper or Spigot.
- If you do, the plugins or mods you're using that may alter the functioning of data packs.
- The list of other data packs you're using, if you have others.
- A clear description of your issue, and a way to reproduce it.
- If necessary, a video or a screenshot of the issue in game.

# 📌 Other links
